subcodes.first_line: O ancient friend! Though thou art known as "Māhyārī" (Moon-friend), I hope that thou mayest become a divine friend, a helper and companion to every noble soul [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار دیرین هر چند بنام ماهیاری امیدوارم که بهایار گردی یار و یاور هر بزرگوار
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @attaining the life of the spirit, @Manifestation of God as sun
